name: list_customers
description: List all customers for a specific business, including their contact details and outstanding balances. Requires the business ID obtained from list_businesses.

parameters.name: businessId
parameters.description: The ID of the business to list customers for.

body.query: query($businessId: ID!) { business(id: $businessId) { customers { edges { node { id name email address { city province country } } } } } }
